title: Unlimited approvals to external spenders persist indefinitely
reason: The lingering approvals shown here do not by themselves give arbitrary third parties a concrete drain path from this contract, especially for the Uniswap routers; the report depends on unproven spender-side behavior outside the provided code.

title: Counter allows arbitrary users to rewrite critical state
reason: `Counter.sol` is a minimal sample contract whose only purpose is to expose public mutators; no privileged invariant, treasury, or protocol-critical workflow is present in the provided code.
